title: Theory Conformance Artifact
description: Machine-readable conformance summary verifying that a runtime execution is internally consistent with its declared branch-local assumptions. A passing artifact does NOT imply theory-level validity, canonicity of the branch, or that outputs match physical reality. See ASSUMPTIONS.md.

conformanceId.description: Unique identifier for this conformance evaluation run.

branchId.description: Branch ID under which conformance was checked.

overallPass.description: Overall pass/fail. False if any check fails. Trivial-state checks are informational and do not contribute to failure.

validationScope.description: Scope declaration. Always 'branch-local'. This field is mandatory and enforced to prevent misinterpretation of passing conformance as theory-level validation.

scopeDisclaimer.description: Human-readable disclaimer about what passing conformance means and does not mean. Must reference branch-local scope and ASSUMPTIONS.md.

category.description: Check category. branch-identity: runtime operator IDs match declared manifest. trivial-state: execution path is trivial or zero-state (informational only). scope-boundary: conformance scope is properly declared.

detail.description: Human-readable description of the check result, including which values were compared.

validationType.description: Validation type. Always 'branch-local' in this harness.
